info.english_meaning: to obstruct to surround to besiege to enclose to obscure
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' AvaraRam = vyAptiH ' iti kzIrasvAmI  ' runDe ruRaDyAvaraRe kAmenAvanuruDyate ' (Slo. 121) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'atIrTena vA ayamaDvaryurAhutIH prArOtsIt' (Sa॰brA॰11.4.2.14) prArOtsIt=aBraMSayat
'anuvratAmapa jAyAmaroDam' (f॰10.34.2) aparoDam=apAroDam=apAruDam=avArayam=svasmAd dUre'pAsyam=parARudaM gfhAt
'sAyamAgatamatiTiM nAparunDyAt' (va॰Darma॰8.4) na parARudeta
'dvEzwi SvaSrUrapa jAyA ruRadDi' (f॰10.34.2) gfhapraveSAd vArayati na me tvayA kaScidarTa iti pratyAcazwe
'yo'vagataH so'paruDyatAM yo'parudDaH so'vagacCatu' (tE॰saM॰6.6.5.3) aparuDyatAm=vAryatAm
'duzwarIturha pOsAyanaH daSapuruzaM rAjyAdaparudDa Asa' (Sa॰brA॰12.9.3.1) aparudDaH=nirastaH=bahizkftaH daSapuruzam rAjyAt=A daSaByaH puruzeByaH svavaMSajezu sTitAdrAjyAt
'anyakzetre'parudDa carantam' (aTarva॰3.3.4) aparudDaH san avarudDaM pracCannaM yaTA syAttaTA loke yamarTamavarudDaSabda Aha tamiha cCandasyaparudDaSabdaH upasargaBedo nArTaBedaH
'sinDukzidrAjarziryogaparudDaScaran' (paYcaviMSa॰12.12.6) ukto'rTaH
'yasya vratye'hani patnyanAlamBukA syAt tAmaparuDya yajeta' (yAjYa॰3.45 mitAkzarAyAmudDftam) aparuDya=parihftya
'tasmAdAhurna sAyamatiTiraparuDya iti' (E॰brA॰5.30) aparuDyaH=aparoDyaH=apanodyaH=nirAkaraRIyaH
'etAM vAva sa devatAmaparuRadDi yo'lamagnihotraH sannAgnihotraM juhoti' (E0 brA0 530) aparuRadDi niH sArayati
'apemaM jIvA aruDan gfheByaH' (aTarva0 18227) apAruDan bahirakurvan vyapAvartayan
'AdityeByo DArayad dadByaScaruM nirvapedaparudDo vA'paruDyamAno vA' (tE0 saM0 2311) aparudDo vEriRA svarAzwrAnniHsAritaH rAjAntareRApahftarAzwra iti yAvat
'yadyu vA enamupaDAvedrAzwrAdaparuDyamAnaH' (E0 brA0 810) rAzwrAdaparuDyamAnaH=rAzwrAnnirvAsitaH BraMSitaH
'dyAvApfTivyAM DenumAlaBeta jyogaparudDaH' (tE0 saM0 214) aparudDaSciraM durgataH
'aparudDaM tu muKyaputrApasarpAH pratipAdyAnayeyuH' (kO0 a0 11813) aparudDamapriyaM rAjakumAram
'tfRamiva laGurlakzmIrnEva tAn saMruRadDi' (Bartf॰2.17) saMruRadDi=sandAnayati
'kaccinna loBAnmohAdvA viSramBAtpraRayena vA …ASritAnAM manuzyARAM vfttiM tvaM saMruRatsi vE' (BA॰saBA॰5.92).. saMruRatsi=pratyAcakze
'meGESca gaganaM nIlaH saMrudDamaBavad GanEH' (BA॰anu॰148.1) saMrudDamAvftam
'yo mocayati saMrudDamidaM pravahaRaM mama' (kaTA॰18.266) saMrudDam=uparudDam
'ajAvike tu saMrudDe vfkaH pAle tvanAyati' (manu॰8.235) saMrudDe=parivfte Askanne
'KaM ca BUmiM ca saMrudDAM menire kzatriyarzaBAH' (BA॰droRa॰129.16) saMrudDAmekatAmApannAm
evamuktvA tato rAmaM saMruDya BrukuwiM tataH (rA॰3.30.16) saMruDya=sannibadDya
'saMroDAdAyuzaScEva vyasyante dvApare ca te' (vedAH) (mAtsya0 14248) saMroDaH saMkocaH apakarzaH
'yadyapi na santiruDyate duHKaM taTApi tadaBiBavaH SakyaH kartum' (sANKya ta0 kA0 1 vyAKyAyAm ) sanniruDyate=ucCidyate
'SrutiSca sanniruDyate purA taveha' (BA0 SAM0 32139)
'kAmakroDasya loBasya sannirudDasya meDayA' (hari0 3185)
'SOdraM hi kurvataH karma DarmaH samuparuDyate' (BA0 anu0 357) samuparuDyate=viGnito Bavati
'anvavAroDi gorgopa lakena' (na ruDaH 3164 sUtre vfttiH) gozWe'varudDa ityarTaH

'sa ha gavAM sahasramavaruroDa' (bf0 u0 311) vraje'pidaDO kaTaM tarhImO dvO praDAnaSabdO yugapadavaruDyete ( ) niyamyete ityarTaH gAmavaruRadDi vrajam yadA praveSayatItyarTastadA ('DikaraRasya) karmasaMjYA vihitA (pA0 1451 sUtra nyAse)

'utpattiSca niroDaSca nityO BUtezu pArTiva' (hari0 12 54-55) BUtezu paSvAdizUtpattirnityA svABAvikI sApiRqyaniyamaM vinA prajotpAdanaM svABAvikaM taTA manuzyezu niroDo nityaH asapiRqAM samudvahediti niyamaH svABAvikaM iti nIlakaRWaH atra svIkfto niroDaSabdArTo nAntareRa klizwakalpanAM laByaH utpattiniroDO jananamaraRe iti tu fjurarTaH SabdamaryAdayA sulaBaH

'niroDo'syAnuSayanamAtmanaH saha SaktiBiH' (BA0 pu0 2106) niroDo layaH
